message:
fix(engine): strengthen content hash determinism and numeric safety across subsystems

Continued audit hardening for content hash stability and numeric safety:

counterexample_synthesizer.rs:
- Replace silent unwrap_or_default() with descriptive expect() for
  scenario serialization failures
- Sort violating nodes before hashing to ensure insertion-order
  independence in content digests

execution_orchestrator.rs:
- Replace wrapping_add(1) with saturating_add(1) for attempt counter
  to prevent wrap-around to 0 on overflow

regexp_string_governance.rs:
- GovernanceReceipt hash now includes violation description,
  actual_millionths, and threshold_millionths (previously only kind)

security_conformance.rs:
- corpus_manifest_hash() sorts records by workload_id before hashing
  for order-independence; test updated from assert_ne to assert_eq

translation_validation_receipt.rs:
- hash_rewrite_category() uses stable numeric discriminants (0-9)
  instead of Display strings, decoupling hash from formatting
- ProofEvidence hash includes metadata.len() prefix to prevent
  ambiguous concatenation
- Quarantine-on-inconclusive now reads config instead of hardcoded false

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
